Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCE. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. Plaintiff Creditors Trade Association, Inc.'s Motion to Compel Answers to Discovery granted as follows:

1. With reference to plaintiff's Request For Production of Documents [Set No. One], all objections [except attorney-client, and attorney work product privileges] are waived; defendant Mia Alt, individually dba Feed The People shall provide full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's Request For Production of Documents within 15 days of this Order;

2. With reference to plaintiff's First Set of Special Interrogatories, all objections [except attorney-client, and attorney work product privileges] are waived; defendant Mia Alt, individually dba Feed The People shall provide full, complete and verified responses to plaintiff's First Set of Special Interrogatories within 15 days of this Order;

3. With reference to plaintiff's Request For Admissions and Admission of Genuineness of Documents, plaintiff's requests for admission, and admission of the genuineness of documents are deemed admitted.

4. Sanctions are issued against defendant Mia Alt individually dba Feed The People in the sum of $300.00: a. Imposition of sanctions is stayed for a period of 15 days following this order; b. If defendant Alt provides response to interrogatories and request for production within 15 days as set forth in this Order, sanctions shall be permanently stayed. COMM. PAUL SLAVIT.
